features.name: Initial Margin HKv13 executable mock validation

scenarios.name: Risk Parameter File contains required fields
steps: Given an Initial Margin Risk Parameter File contains required global fields and supported FieldType records
When the risk parameter file is validated
Then the risk parameter file validation is accepted

scenarios.name: Aggregated market risk component is rounded up
steps: Given market risk total is below a rounding unit
Then the market risk is rounded up before offsets and add-ons
